creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
It works for me.  In what scenario do you think that it would fail?

[root@localhost /usr/home/alans/spectra/SpectraBSD_ports/devel/lutok]#
pkg_add lutok-0.2.tbz
[root@localhost /usr/home/alans/spectra/SpectraBSD_ports/devel/lutok]#
ls /usr/local/share/doc/lutok/
AUTHORS	COPYING	NEWS	README	html
[root@localhost /usr/home/alans/spectra/SpectraBSD_ports/devel/lutok]#
ls /usr/local/share/examples/lutok/
Makefile	bindings.cpp	hello.cpp	interpreter.cpp	raii.cpp
[root@localhost /usr/home/alans/spectra/SpectraBSD_ports/devel/lutok]#
pkg_delete lutok-0.2
[root@localhost /usr/home/alans/spectra/SpectraBSD_ports/devel/lutok]#
ls /usr/local/share/doc/lutok/
ls: /usr/local/share/doc/lutok/: No such file or directory
[root@localhost /usr/home/alans/spectra/SpectraBSD_ports/devel/lutok]#
ls /usr/local/share/examples/lutok/
ls: /usr/local/share/examples/lutok/: No such file or directory
